subcodes.first_line: O thou fresh blossom of the garden of God's love! The glances of divine mercy have ever been and shall remain directed towards thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوگل گلشن محبت الله لحظات عین رحمانیت حق متوجه حال شما بوده و خواهد بود و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
